name: Colossal Forge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on buildings owned.
formula: (6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is buildings owned

name: Charged Clicks
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Era.
formula: (25 + 2.5 * log10(1 + x) ^ 2.5 + x ^ 0.25)%, where x is clicks this Era

name: Titan Obelisk
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on Neutral time this Reincarnation.
formula: +(3 * x ^ 0.7)%, where x is Neutral time this Reincarnation

name: Titan Drill
effect: Increase base production of Warrior Barracks/Slave Pens/Deep Mines by +9,635 and Cathedrals/Dark Temples/Monasteries by +98,000 (by alignment). Also increase those tiers' production by 1,000%.

name: Charged Structures
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on active spells.
formula: (15 * x)%, where x is active spells

name: Titan Sized Walls
effect: Increase Hall of Legends production based on assistants owned.
formula: (20 + 2.15 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2.15)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Cyclopean Strength
effect: Assistants count 200% more, and their production is increased by 200%.

name: Heavy Coins
effect: Royal Exchanges production bonus increased by additional 100% each. Reduces Royal Exchange cost multiplier by 0.01 (becomes 1.09).

name: Oversized Legends
effect: Reduce Hall of Legends cost multiplier by 0.01 (becomes 1.14). Increase assistant production based on Halls of Legends built.
formula: (6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Halls of Legends built

name: Giant Market
effect: Royal Exchanges count more based on highest Mountain Palaces built this Reincarnation.
formula: (x ^ 0.7)%, where x is highest Mountain Palaces this Reincarnation

name: Titanic Authority
effect: Increase production of Unique Buildings based on Royal Exchanges made.
formula: (x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Royal Exchanges bought

name: Colossus Kingdom
effect: Gain assistants based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation.
formula: +(25 * x ^ 0.7), where x is Order time this Reincarnation
